tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: Hello, could I speak to Daniel, please?
Y: _________
options: A) I'm sorry, he's not in at the moment. Can I take a message?
B) Yes, I speak to him very well, thank you.
C) No, you couldn't to speak with Daniel now.

items.stem:
X: Sorry, the line's really bad. Could you speak up a bit?
Y: _________
options: A) Yes, I close the window for the line.
B) Of course. Is this any better? Can you hear me now?
C) No, I don't speak up the bit, sorry.
A) It's me calling for you on the phone now.
B) Yes, I am calling you please right now.
C) It's Olivia from the music school.

items.stem:
X: I'm afraid Mr Brooks is in a meeting right now.
Y: _________
options: A) Could you ask him to call me back when he's free?
B) Yes, he is afraid of the meeting very much.
C) I'm afraid him too, so I will call later please.

items.stem:
X: Hi Mum, I think I've left my keys at home. Can you check?
Y: _________
options: A) Yes, I leave your keys at home very good.
B) Hold on a second, I'll have a look on the table.
C) No, I don't check the keys you left it home.

items.stem:
X: Thanks for calling. I'll see you on Saturday, then.
Y: _________
options: A) Yes, I call you for the thanks on Saturday too.
B) No, I don't see you on Saturday for calling me.
C) Great, see you then. Bye for now!
